# AWS AgentCore

Track AWS AgentCore patterns relevant to hosted agent runtimes and sandboxed tool execution.

## What To Cover

- Runtime model
- Tool/action integration
- Identity and permissions
- Network controls
- Observability
- Deployment path
- Relationship to Bedrock agent infrastructure

## Cookbook Examples

- `examples/aws-agentcore/http-tool-sandbox`

## Checklist

- [ ] Minimal runtime example
- [ ] HTTP sandbox adapter
- [ ] IAM/network policy notes
- [ ] Structured errors
- [ ] Timeout behavior
- [ ] Session/state behavior
- [ ] Observability notes
- [ ] Deployment notes
